creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
vbox@ is forwarded to freebsd-emulation@, see

ff:/etc/aliases:

# Forward vbox to emulation where most of the discussion takes place
vbox:           emulation

and I guess, emulation is this:

https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-emulation

Should this really be changed ?
